mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_run_log ( trace_id, user_message, answer, used_tool, tool_name, tool_result, decision_cost_ms, tool_cost_ms, summary_cost_ms, agent_cost_ms, success, error_message ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{userMessage}, #{answer}, #{usedTool}, #{toolName}, #{toolResult}, #{decisionCostMs}, #{toolCostMs}, #{summaryCostMs}, #{agentCostMs}, #{success}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, trace_id, user_message, answer, used_tool, tool_name, tool_result, decision_cost_ms, tool_cost_ms, summary_cost_ms, agent_cost_ms, success, error_message, created_time FROM agent_run_log WHERE trace_id = #{traceId}

SELECT id, trace_id, user_message, answer, used_tool, tool_name, decision_cost_ms, tool_cost_ms, summary_cost_ms, agent_cost_ms, success, error_message, created_time FROM agent_run_log ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
